ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geographic_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the geographic area */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the geographic area (e.g., 7950000US1703501) */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic area */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the geographic area is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the geographic area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographic area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographic area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of geographic area (e.g., PUMA, Census Tract) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the area was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the population statistics entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic area */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year to which the population statistics apply */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the geographic area */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Total male population in the geographic area */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Total female population in the geographic area */,
  "total_15_25_yo" INTEGER /* Total population aged 15-25 years */,
  "males_15_25" INTEGER /* Total male population aged 15-25 years */,
  "females_15_25" INTEGER /* Total female population aged 15-25 years */,
  "percent_male" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is male */,
  "percent_female" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is female */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object with detailed age distribution data */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object with detailed race distribution data */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object with detailed ethnicity distribution data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_stats_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES geographic_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city planner, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mappings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_id in the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role_id in the user_roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_id in the users table */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
